name: WIENER NEUSTADT/OST

hoursOfOperation.remarks:
AD PPR

OPS HR of tower:
During legal summer time 0630-ECET; 
During Central European winter time 0700-1600.

Permission for flights planned to be performed before or after must be requested from AD OPS office until 1200 of the previous day at the latest. 
The additional fees and the application form for this can be found on the homepage.
